description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a prominent marquee at the top displaying the word 'VARIATION' in bold, illuminated letters. The front panel includes a large, rectangular screen set within a light blue bezel, a control panel with a joystick and several colored buttons, and a coin slot area below. The cabinet is primarily brown with retro-styled, multicolored stripes in orange, cream, and teal running diagonally along the side panels, giving it a vintage 1980s arcade aesthetic. The back of the cabinet is plain black with ventilation grilles and access panels, while the sides are solid and unbroken except for the decorative stripes. The materials appear to be mostly wood or MDF with plastic and metal components for the controls and coin mechanism. The overall build is sturdy and designed for public use in entertainment venues.
description: A vintage upright arcade game cabinet with a bold 'VARIATION' marquee, retro multicolored side stripes, and a classic joystick/button control panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the illuminated marquee, large screen, joystick and buttons, and coin slot area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the diagonal retro stripes and the cabinet's angular profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain black back panel with ventilation grilles and access panels.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same multicolored stripes and angular shape.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium size with a thick bezel and slightly recessed into the cabinet
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and three colored buttons arranged in a row, with a circular start button; control panel is black with colored accents.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the word 'VARIATION' in bold, glowing letters with an orange and cream color scheme, set against a dark background with a retro arcade theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Diagonal retro stripes in orange, cream, and teal; no additional imagery or decals.
